title: hymenophyllum acutum
intro: Hymenophyllum acutum, also known as the toothed filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum acutum are said to include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a tea or tincture, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
